title: The proclamation in Baghdad of Ibrahim b. al-Mahdi as anti-caliph
description: The proclamation in Baghdad of Ibrahim b. al-Mahdi as anti-caliph. Recorded under the year 201 AH (c. 817 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 32.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 32
